title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 234.050 - Toll bridges, how controlled
text:
234.050.  Toll bridges, how controlled. — The control and management of any toll bridge or toll road which may have been constructed originally by any corporation, partnership or person, whether chartered under the general laws or organized under special act, whose charter has expired or may hereafter expire, is hereby passed to and vested in the county commission of the county or counties in which such bridge or road may be situated.
(RSMo 1939 § 8537) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 7901; 1919 § 10689; 1909 § 10494
